'''Jarsa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] who served the [[Bureau of Scouting and Exploration Services]]. She served alongside [[Deeve]] on the NRSS scout ship ''[[Founder]]'', which she was capable of repairing and piloting.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=A Typical Survey|book=Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts}} {{1st}}
